arts.ttl: ‘A great talent’ - Flick hails ‘fearless’ Barca teen Toni Fernandez
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick was full of praise for youngster Toni Fernandez after handing the teenager his first-team debut on Saturday in the Copa del Rey . “He is a great talent and he is also fearless,” he told reporteres.

arts.ttl: Barca raise spirits with a strong performance to start the year
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong, Eric Garcia, and Pablo Torre all had very strong games, and will surely be looking to break through to start the year, putting pressure on the likes of Marc Casado and Fermin Lopez. Barcelona were focused in the face of major off the field distractions, and got the performance they needed against Barbastro, to open up their Copa del Rey campaign .

arts.ttl: Concern for Barcelona? Key defender emerges as transfer target for PSG
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has made his way onto the transfer wishlist of French champions Paris Saint-Germain. That’s according to Spanish football…

arts.ttl: Pablo Torre allows Barca to take focus away from Olmo mess
arts.sum: For the past few days all that’s made the headlines in the media as far as Barca are concerned is whether they club are going to be able to re-register Dani Olmo without a problem. In any event, it was good for the Blaugranes to get back to doing what they know best on the pitch, and unlike the relatively under par performance against the same opponents in this competition a year ago, this tie was never in doubt - with Pablo Torre in particular a constant menace .

arts.ttl: Liverpool DEVASTATE Man Utd, Barca’s Olmo BLOW, Chelsea transfer ADMISSION
arts.sum: The January transfer window might not have produced a big deal yet, but there’s no shortage of drama, with Liverpool, Manchester United, Barcelona and Chelsea at the heart of matters. Liverpool DEVASTATE Man Utd, Barca’s Olmo BLOW, Chelsea transfer ADMISSION – FootballTransfers Recap

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick confirms Barcelona star missed Copa clash with fitness problem
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has confirmed that key attacker Raphinha was absent from the club’s squad to face Barbastro owing to a fitness concern. The Blaugrana marked their return…

arts.ttl: Flick confident of Olmo registration, Barça stay
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said he remains confident that Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor will be able to play for the club again this season.

arts.ttl: Ronald Araújo hails ‘incredible’ young Barcelona teammate after win over Barbastro
arts.sum: Barcelona star Ronald Araújo has this evening moved to reveal his appreciation for the talents of young teammate Toni Fernandéz. This comes after the starlet enjoyed an outing to remember…

arts.ttl: Barcelona youngster sends message to Hansi Flick vs Barbastro
arts.sum: Barcelona star Pablo Torre made use of his latest outing on Saturday to send something of a message to head coach Hansi Flick. The message in question? I’m here, and…
